finding_results.notes: Replaced the chapter's remaining classificatory 'kind of' constructions with concrete renderings of fragmented care, unaffordable coverage, worn paperwork, and redirected medication surplus.
Removed the repeated cardigan callout and signature-item gloss from Harry's entrance so the opening scene identifies him through blocking and presence instead of re-teaching the same image.

summary: Chapter 10 now preserves its two-scene revelation structure while removing the repeated 'kind of' prose tic and cutting this chapter's contribution to Harry's over-repeated cardigan image.
